_schema_note: Per-model percentile bands for CLIP ViT-L/14 similarity scores. Used by scripts/clip_score.py to translate raw scores into model-aware bands. Initial values approximated from 2026 research; refresh quarterly against actual generations.
_units: raw cosine similarity from CLIP ViT-L/14
_bands: p50 = median, p25 = lower quartile, p10 = bottom decile. A score below the p10 of its model strongly suggests re-generation.
